financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The bank made more money this year compared to last year, which is a good sign.
The bank's financial health is strong, and there are no big problems in their financial reports.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The bank is doing a good job managing risks, but it still lends a lot to companies with lower credit ratings, which could be risky.
There are some concerns about loans not being paid back, especially in certain areas, and changes in currency values might affect the bank's finances.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Average
bullets: The company is doing okay but has room to improve in how it manages its responsibilities to society and the environment.
Their leadership and decision-making processes are just average, suggesting they could be more effective in guiding the company.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders spoke confidently about their strong financial results and future plans.
They acknowledged some challenges but remained optimistic, which is why the score is high.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Poor
bullets: The company didn't fully explain their plans for the future, making it hard to understand their direction.
They only gave detailed answers to some questions, leaving others unclear and lacking important numbers.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Very Poor
bullets: The bank is doing well in some areas like business loans and mortgages, but there are worries about unpaid loans and fewer car and credit card loans.
Even though the bank is strong financially, the mixed results make it a cautious choice for investors right now.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: ICICI Bank is doing well financially, making more money than last year and keeping enough money aside for safety.
The bank is growing in important areas, but faces challenges like competition and some weaker parts of its business.
